title: LD's Fortified Towns And Cities
description: Have you ever wanted properly walled-in villages? Well, this datapack adds in those, and a few more structures. Included are fortified cities, towns with small walls and forts, forlorn castles, cultist monasteries, and lone estates.
body:
Have you ever wanted properly walled-in villages? Well, this datapack adds in those, and a few more structures.

**Current Structures:**

![An image of a Fortress City](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce497a0ee48769791e2153f72e72524848f4800a_0.webp)
![Minimap Image of a Fortress City](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ca9525cee3d2350fb05bdaf5d67069c7311068a.png)
![An image of a Fortress City Near the Street Level](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b567bd43491ffa165e8e033032fc269780e606b3_0.webp)
Fortress Cities

- Generates surrounded by walls with garrison and security buildings generating throughout.
- Has a variety of shops, residences, markets, underground structures, plazas, parks, art galleries, government buildings, etc.
- Very, very large in size and population - can be used a great place to build or start from.

![An image of a Fortified Town on the coast.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a43325e341c158986258b02835288671027de1d_0.webp)
![An image of a Fortified Town on the hillside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b5bc3e2be8475ed70648814e45957ccb888e578a_0.webp)
Fortified Towns

- Contain walls, towers, and rarely a larger fortress with TNT cannons.
- Includes a variety of custom-designed buildings.
- Walls are not guaranteed to surround the towns.

![An image of a Fortified City from the outside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1acb267e09f56bba256b7858b0fa0e865818978_0.webp)
![An image of a Fortified City from the outside at sunset.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aafbe1e7249bc5ab27cb311c77bcc51153f29e64_0.webp)
Fortified Cities

- Generates surrounded by walls with small towers for defense.
- Has a variety of shops, residences, and city buildings.
- Very large in size and population.

![An image of a Youthful Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1638dd52f74b038791ada8704fe622fdf03466a_0.webp)
Youthful Villages
![A secret below the Youthful Village awaits...](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddddbcd07799a386e0f7bec673da2dfba60fc098.png)
- Communal buildings all connected with paths running through them.
- Lush and vibrant block pallet with some okay loot.
- Dark secret hidden underground which you may chance upon at night.

![An image of a Blockhouse Village.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0ee3bed17ada9ffcd088f1630ef4c305fb15bc8d_0.webp)
![An image of a Blockhouse Village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9d380b0e1c4374584675dd61c4cf5538f6664606_0.webp)
Blockhouse Villages

Architecture inspired by blockhouse fortresses.
Relatively small village, but good for outposts or small bases.
Loot based on its fortress origins.

![An image of a Lone Estate from the outside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b79b6622ca679f728cfd714d92bfc83d728a7bd2_0.webp)
![An image of a Lone Estate from the inside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e23bb53e029e1b62010ce6f4e0907d4dba8d51fb_0.webp)
Lone Estate

- Rare structure inhabited by a lone hermit.
- Contains a variety of rooms and loot.
- Harbors a secret.

![An image of a Cultist Monastery from the outside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/64bfdc9fd30ac72f9f40786c4d4b8f76e9ff9108_0.webp)
![An image of a Cultist from the inside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5517e67d8254198bdc221fd715d100e1890d24a0.png)
Cultist Monastery

- An uncommon dungeon-like structure with a few buildings surrounding a main monastery building.
- Defeat the inhabitants to gain a variety of loot.
- Discover what beliefs seem to guide the cult.

![An image of a Forlorn Castle from the outside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/447d0adf1cd497ea2224e7ffbb8e03e84d23ac06_0.webp)
![An image of a Forlorn Castle from the inside.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f72178631fbefb086fa3d238891b2433c6095f01_0.webp)
Forlorn Castle

- Very rare and sprawling dungeon structure.
- Contains lots of loot, a few traps, and several mobs with diamond armor and enchanted swords to challenge players.
- Contains a small story about the downfall of the past monarchy.

**Compatibility:**

From current tests, the included structures do not appear to override vanilla, modded, or other datapack structures so this datapack should be compatible with any other datapacks or mods.
